title: Make Haste, O God, to Save Me

verses.text: Make haste, O God, to save me; Lord, hasten to my aid. May those who seek to kill me be shamed and sore dismayed. May all who seek my hurt be turned back in their disgrace. May all who say “Aha!”turn in shame, their steps retrace.

But may all those who seek you rejoice, in you be glad; may those who love salvation say, “God be magnified!” Yet I am poor and needy; come quickly , God, I pray. O Lord, my help and Saviour, make haste. Do not delay.
